heading: Monitor Your Progress
body:
Atlas provides the following methods to visualize query targeting:

- Query Targeting
  [performance metrics](monitor-cluster-metrics), which highlight high ratios
  of objects scanned to objects returned.

- [monitor collection-level query latency](namespace-insights), which monitors
  collection-level query latency.

- The [Query Profiler](query-profiler), which describes specific
  inefficient queries executed on the cluster.
